answers: Start with walks, bodyweight exercises (push-ups, squats, planks), stay consistent, track progress.
No gym? No problem. Push-ups, squats, planks, and jumping jacks at home daily will make a huge difference. Just stay consistent.
Fitness basics: 30 minutes of movement daily, eat in a slight calorie deficit for weight loss, and get enough sleep for recovery.
Start simple — a 20-minute walk daily, 3 sets of push-ups and squats, and track your progress weekly. Consistency beats intensity!
